title: Innocent Creepers
description: Don't get too comfortable, they might explode!
body: "Innocent Creepers" is a resource pack that turns Minecraft's iconic Creepers into cute, harmless looking creatures with softer colors and friendlier designs. But don’t be fooled, despite their innocent appearance, they’re still just as dangerous! Future updates will introduce multiple versions with different textures, including fun, meme-inspired designs and other playful twists. These versions will keep your gameplay fresh while adding a humorous and deceptive charm to your world. Stay tuned for more creative and amusing updates!
